[ ] adds new holdings entries. Institutional Investment Manager Filing this Report: Name: Renaissance Technologies, Inc. Address: 800 3rd Avenue 33rd floor New York, NY 10022 13F File Number: 28-6262 The institutional investment manager filing this report and the person by whom it is signed hereby represent that the person signing the report is authorized to submit it, that all information contained herein is true, correct and complete, and that it is understood that all required items, statements, schedules, lists, and tables, are considered integral parts of this form. Person Signing this Report on Behalf of Reporting Manager: Name: Mark Silber Title: Vice President Phone: (212) 486-6780 Signature, Place, and Date of Signing: Mark Silber New York, New York May 14, 1999 Report Type (Check only one.): [ X] 13F HOLDINGS REPORT. [ ] 13F NOTICE. [ ] 13F COMBINATION REPORT. I AM SIGNING THIS REPORT AS REQUIRED BY THE SECURITIES EXCHANGE ACT OF 1934. FORM 13F SUMMARY PAGE Report Summary: Number of Other Included Managers: 0 Form 13F Information Table Entry Total: 591 Form 13F Information Table Value (x $1000) Total: $2486258 Information for which we are requesting confidential treatment has been omitted and filed separately with the Commission.
